name: mayieat-web
description: MayiEat - Healthy food scanner with personalized nutrition ratings

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint: npm -w @mayieat/backend run lint && npm -w @mayieat/frontend run lint
